name: Manhatten Pigs Tails
steps: Cut the safe guard off the top of the razors to expose the blade.
Shave the hair off the tails and clean.
Place an even layer of tails in each vacuum bag and seal fully.
Cook for 6 hours or overnight at 92 degrees on full steam.
Remove from the vacuum bags the following day and drain the excess liquid and flesh to use later.
Gently, lightly go down the tail.
Debone keeping the meat on the skin.
Wrap bones tightly in greaseproof paper and vacuum once sealed.
Place pig's tail between greaseproof paper in a big pan.
Put a weight on top to press the tail flat against the pan.
Cook on a flat top until crispy.

other_details.To prepare: Take from the lab in reduced milk.
other_details.To cook: Vacuum and store in reduced milk. For service defrost, full bag per service. Add 45% Kuzu. Dissolve and heat slowly until above 65 degrees and translucent. Season and keep above 65 degrees in the oven or circulator.
